title: sida elliptica
intro: Sida elliptica, also known as the country mallow or button weed, is a plant species in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sida elliptica include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sida elliptica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
